attributes.aria-label: Take a closer look at Apple Aether

children.text: Take a closer look at Aether.

Apple Aether is
                                                    sculpted as one continuous
                                                    surface, with refined
                                                    aerodynamics to help it
                                                    reach an incredibly low drag
                                                    coefficiency.

A calm interior
                                                    where controls appear only
                                                    when needed, and every
                                                    surface is designed to
                                                    reduce noise, distraction,
                                                    and effort.

Voice, touch,
                                                    gesture, and spatial
                                                    controls work together so
                                                    information appears at the
                                                    right time, in the right
                                                    place.

Apple Aether
                                                    continuously understands its
                                                    surroundings, adapts to you,
                                                    and works seamlessly across
                                                    your Apple ecosystem.

Advanced sensing and
                                                    intelligent assistance help
                                                    every drive feel more aware,
                                                    more responsive, and more at
                                                    ease.

Fast charging, smart
                                                    scheduling, and route-aware
                                                    energy guidance keep Aether
                                                    ready when you are.
